_comment: Favorites-only backtest/small-account config. SIZING (iter 47): bullet_pct raised 0.02->0.03 after an OOS sizing sweep (research_sizing.py) showed 2% was far below the geometric-growth-optimal for a small account — geo-growth/mkt rises 0.29->0.41% (test) while DD stays 9.2% (vs the 25% kill-switch). The win is a SMALL-ACCOUNT effect: it collapses above ~$10k as thin-book caps bind (+2345pp@$1k -> +15pp@$100k), consistent with the edge's $1-10k capacity. 0.03 is a deliberate FRACTIONAL-Kelly choice (growth-optimal was ~0.06+, DD 16%); kept conservative for estimation-error safety. Raise toward 0.04-0.06 only with higher risk appetite AND small capital.
